contact_points.description: At the cap of the perfume bottle
contact_points.usage: Used to grip the perfume bottle from the top down.

contact_points.description: At the body of the perfume bottle
contact_points.usage: Used to hold or grip the perfume bottle from the sides.

functional_points.description: At the bottom of the perfume bottle
functional_points.usage: Used for placing the perfume bottle on a surface.
